predicates.name: is_legally_cohabiting_partner_of
predicates.description: The first person is the legally cohabiting partner of the second person.

predicates.name: is_surviving_cohabiting_partner
predicates.description: The first person is the surviving legally cohabiting partner of the second (predeceased) person.

predicates.name: is_descendant_of
predicates.description: The first person is a descendant of the second person.

predicates.name: exception_applies_surviving_partner_is_descendant
predicates.description: The exception applies because the surviving legally cohabiting partner is a descendant of the predeceased legally cohabiting partner, making the preceding provisions inapplicable.

predicates.name: preceding_provisions_apply
predicates.description: The preceding statutory provisions apply to the surviving legally cohabiting partner in relation to the predeceased partner.
